checkpoints.message: Town: Check the skill vendor for new gems
Act 2: Check vendors for new skill gems and support gems
Level 4: First support gem slot opens — check vendor
Level 8: New support gems available at the vendor
Level 12: Check vendor for skill upgrades. Consider upgrading weapon base
Level 18: New weapon base tier available — look for upgrades
Level 24: Gear upgrade tier — check weapons and armor
Level 28: Significant gear tier — upgrade weapon if possible
Level 38: Check for weapon and armor upgrades
Level 45: Final campaign gear tier — upgrade everything before maps
